repo.description: an open-source implementation of sequence-to-sequence based speech processing engine

terms.context_snippet: *Athena* is an open-source implementation of end-to-end speech processing engine. Our vision is to empower both industrial application and academic research on end-to-end models for speech processing. To make speech processing available to everyone, we're also releasing example …
